topic: tea-rags filter construction beyond pathPattern — typed sugar, level=file/chunk, picomatch negation, raw filter escape hatch, trigger-coverage for implicit scopes
context: New agent-only skill (user-invocable: false) extracted from search-cascade.md. Two eval coverages: (1) execution_coverage — agent receives an explicit filter intent and must build the correct shape; (2) trigger_coverage — agent receives a prompt that does NOT use the word 'filter' but where a SCOPE is implicit (domain, language, author, time window, ticket, prod-vs-test), and the agent must self-trigger the skill and translate the scope into typed sugar. Trigger coverage is the harder probe because it tests whether the description and Implicit-signals table reliably steer the agent.

execution_coverage.baseline_skipped: trigger is explicit in prompt; baseline irrelevant

execution_coverage.prompt: In the payments domain, find code modified after 2026-03-01 for sprint review.
execution_coverage.expected_NOT: raw filter on git.file.modifiedAt; chunk-level time filter; ripgrep
execution_coverage.failure_mode: Agent omits level=file (chunk-level time filter rejects all chunks)

execution_coverage.prompt: Search for tests of AuthService — only test files.
execution_coverage.failure_mode: Agent passes a boolean; tea-rags rejects

execution_coverage.audit_finding: typed language vs pathPattern extension glob
execution_coverage.prompt: Find Ruby code that handles retries in the services directory.
execution_coverage.expected_NOT: pathPattern: '**/*.rb' (extension glob instead of typed language)
execution_coverage.failure_mode: Agent uses extension glob, misses index typing benefits

execution_coverage.prompt: Show code related to ticket RAGS-142.
execution_coverage.expected_NOT: ripgrep on 'RAGS-142'; raw filter on git.file.taskIds; query-only search
execution_coverage.failure_mode: Agent treats ticket id as a free-text query

execution_coverage.prompt: Find code primarily authored by Alice.
execution_coverage.expected_NOT: git blame, git log --author, raw filter on git.file.blameDominantAuthor

execution_coverage.prompt: Find production code in the auth module, drop one-off scripts.
Find code at least 90 days old in payments.
execution_coverage.expected_NOT: missing level=file (chunk ageDays=0 means no data)
execution_coverage.failure_mode: Default chunk level silently drops chunks without git data

execution_coverage.prompt: Search the project excluding the vendor directory.
execution_coverage.expected_NOT: raw filter with must_not on path; regex syntax
execution_coverage.failure_mode: Agent doesn't know picomatch supports ! prefix

execution_coverage.prompt: Build a filter for files with commitCount >= 10. What's the exact raw filter syntax?
execution_coverage.expected: ReadMcpResourceTool(server: 'tea-rags', uri: 'tea-rags://schema/filters') FIRST, then build raw filter
execution_coverage.failure_mode: Agent guesses syntax instead of consulting the live schema resource

execution_coverage.prompt: Rank the most bug-prone code in auth using high bugFix and ownership weights — custom rerank.
execution_coverage.expected: Invoke tea-rags:analytics-rerank for the custom weight set; filter-building may still scope pathPattern in parallel
execution_coverage.expected_NOT: filter-building tries to compose the rerank weights itself
execution_coverage.failure_mode: Skill overlap — wrong skill handles rerank choice

execution_coverage.prompt: Hotspot scan but exclude the dominant ingest domain.
execution_coverage.failure_mode: Agent doesn't combine negation with rerank skill

execution_coverage.audit_finding: subagent context — absolute path + testFile=exclude + modifiedAfter
execution_coverage.prompt: [subagent: task-agent] Find usages of paymentService function in /Users/me/proj/src/payments/. Exclude test files. Code modified after 2026-02-01.
execution_coverage.expected: hybrid_search with query + pathPattern: '/Users/me/proj/src/payments/**' + testFile: 'exclude' + modifiedAfter: '2026-02-01' + level: 'file'
execution_coverage.failure_mode: Subagent context strips skill rules; without skill the typed sugar is missed

result.note: hybrid_search + absolute path + testFile + modifiedAfter + level=file

trigger_coverage.prompt: What did Alice ship in payments last week?
trigger_coverage.expected: author: 'Alice' + modifiedAfter: <last week ISO> + level: 'file' + pathPattern: '**/payments/**'
trigger_coverage.expected_NOT: missing level=file; raw filter; missing author typed sugar
trigger_coverage.failure_mode: Agent fails to detect implicit scope (author/time/domain) and runs unfiltered search

result.without_rule_note: Raw filter on git.dominantAuthor + git.ageDays. NO level=file — chunk-level ageDays=0 silently drops chunks. Functional but fragile.

trigger_coverage.audit_finding: implicit testFile from 'tests of X' (no word 'filter')
trigger_coverage.prompt: Show me the tests for the AuthService class.
trigger_coverage.failure_mode: Agent uses boolean type or pathPattern guess

result.without_rule_note: testFile: true — boolean, wrong type. tea-rags expects 'only'|'exclude'|'include' enum.

trigger_coverage.prompt: Production code that handles checkout, not tests.
What's new in the auth module this sprint?
trigger_coverage.failure_mode: Time-based filter on chunk level rejects all chunks

result.without_rule_note: Raw filter on git.ageDays lte:14, no level=file.

trigger_coverage.prompt: Find Ruby code that does retries.
trigger_coverage.failure_mode: Extension glob instead of typed language

result.without_rule_note: Correctly picked language: 'ruby'. Both versions handle this — control case showing baseline isn't completely broken.

trigger_coverage.prompt: Old, untouched parts of the ingest domain.
trigger_coverage.failure_mode: Time-based on chunk level drops chunks

result.without_rule_note: Raw filter on git.ageDays gte:180, no level=file.

trigger_coverage.expected_NOT: raw filter on git.file.taskIds (functional but verbose)
trigger_coverage.failure_mode: Misses typed sugar, uses raw filter

result.without_rule_note: Raw filter on git.taskIds — functional. Borderline pass: typed taskId is the canonical form but the raw filter shape works.

trigger_coverage.audit_finding: implicit testFile=exclude + minCommitCount from 'real production, not throwaway'
trigger_coverage.prompt: Help me onboard — show real production modules, not throwaway scripts.
trigger_coverage.failure_mode: Agent picks one constraint, misses 'throwaway' → minCommitCount

result.without_rule_note: testFile: false (boolean) + custom rerank, no minCommitCount filter.

trigger_coverage.prompt: Where's the docs on rerank presets?
trigger_coverage.expected: semantic_search with query + documentation: 'only' (auto-applies documentationRelevance preset)
trigger_coverage.expected_NOT: find_symbol with a free-text 'rerank presets' symbol query
trigger_coverage.failure_mode: Agent treats it as a symbol lookup, misses documentation typed sugar

result.without_rule_note: find_symbol with symbol='rerank presets' and relativePath='docs/' — symbol lookup won't match a doc topic.

trigger_coverage.audit_finding: subagent context — absolute path + implicit testFile=exclude from 'skip tests'
trigger_coverage.prompt: [subagent: task-agent] Look up usages of paymentService in /Users/me/proj/src/payments/. Skip tests.
trigger_coverage.failure_mode: Subagent context with skill missing falls into boolean filter type
